features.name: chained ternary operators with wire assignments
features.description: Code should include 14 or more levels of chained ternary conditional operators where each result wire feeds into the next ternary expression

features.name: generate for-loop with bit-slice concatenation assignment
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop using genvar that performs bit-slice concatenation assignments to an unpacked array wire

features.name: unpacked array indexed by genvar in continuous assignment RHS
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array (reg or wire) with size greater than 24 elements, indexed by a genvar variable in a ternary expression within a chain of assignments
